targets.description: Stores tracking records for all interface batch files uploaded or ingested into OMEGA.

columns.name: id

columns.explanation: Primary Key. Auto-incremented system generated identifier.

columns.name: uuid
columns.explanation: Unique system generated identifier used for foreign key linkages.

columns.name: in_cm_document_uuid
columns.explanation: Foreign key referencing cm.cm_documents. Links to the physical incoming interface file that is being processed. Will be NULL for system-generated outbound interface files.

columns.name: out_cm_document_uuid
columns.explanation: Foreign key referencing cm.cm_documents. Links to the outgoing interface file or the resulting physical file generated after processing (e.g., ACK/outbound interface file).

columns.name: status
columns.explanation: The workflow/processing status of the file registry. Stored as master code under 'FILESTAT' category, code definition can be found under cm.cm_master_code table.

columns.name: fail_count
columns.explanation:
The number of individual records within the file that failed validation or processing. 

This value will be NULL if in_cm_document_uuid is NULL or only an outgoing physical file is generated.

columns.name: success_count
columns.explanation:
The number of individual records within the file that were processed successfully. 

This value will be NULL if in_cm_document_uuid is NULL or only an outgoing physical file is generated.

columns.name: total_count
columns.explanation: The total number of individual records identified in the file payload.

columns.name: version
columns.explanation: System-assigned value for record versioning used in optimistic locking. The default value is '1'.

columns.name: is_deleted
columns.explanation: Record deletion indicator. Default is 'N'.

columns.name: is_migrated
columns.explanation: Data migration indicator. Default is 'N'.

columns.explanation: System timestamp of record creation.

columns.name: created_by
columns.explanation: Identifier of the user or system batch component that created the record.

columns.name: updated_dt
columns.explanation: System timestamp of last record modification.

targets.description: Stores the announcement details of upcoming issuances, acting as the source data for announcement publication on the MAS website.

columns.name: id
columns.default: GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY (INCREMENT BY 1 MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9223372036854775807 START 150000000000001 CACHE 1 NO CYCLE)
columns.explanation: Primary Key. Auto-incremented system generated identifier.

columns.name: uuid
columns.explanation: Unique system generated identifier used for foreign key linkages.

columns.name: iss_issuance_uuid
columns.explanation: Foreign key referencing iss.iss_issuance. Ties the announcement to the main security issuance table.

columns.name: iss_calendar_data_uuid
columns.explanation: Foreign key referencing iss.iss_calendar_data. Ties the announcement back to its planned calendar listing event.

columns.name: security_code
columns.explanation: Alphanumeric security code for the issue.

columns.name: isin_code
columns.explanation: 12-character International Securities Identification Number.

columns.name: security_type
columns.explanation: The type of security being announced. Stored as a master code under 'SECTYPE' category; code definitions can be found under the cm.cm_master_code table.

columns.name: issuance_type
columns.explanation: Method of issuance. Stored as a master code under 'ISSTYPE' category; code definitions can be found under the cm.cm_master_code table.

columns.name: sgs_type
columns.explanation: Subtype for SGS Bonds. Stored as a master code under 'SGSTYPE' category; code definitions can be found under the cm.cm_master_code table.

columns.name: new_reopen_flag
columns.explanation: Indicates if the issue is a New offering or a Reopen of an existing security.

columns.name: is_benchmark
columns.explanation: Benchmark bond indicator.

columns.name: tenor_value
columns.explanation: Numerical length of the security mapped directly from cm_tenor_params.

columns.name: tenor_unit
columns.explanation: Unit of time for the tenor.

columns.name: announcement_dt
columns.explanation: Date and time when the issuance is publicly announced.

columns.name: publication_dt
columns.explanation: Scheduled publication date and time of the announcement to the public website. Stored with status 'ISSANNSTAT_PUBLISHED' if published immediately, given publication to MAS website is successaful.

columns.name: auction_dt
columns.explanation: Date of the auction event. Stored with 00:00:00 hours.

columns.name: issue_dt
columns.explanation: Date of security issuance and settlement. Stored with 00:00:00 hours.

columns.name: maturity_dt
columns.explanation: Date when the security matures. Stored with 00:00:00 hours.

columns.name: first_coupon_payment_dt
columns.explanation: Date of the first scheduled coupon payment for the security. Stored with 00:00:00 hours.

columns.name: next_coupon_payment_dt
columns.explanation: Date of the next scheduled coupon payment. Stored with 00:00:00 hours.

columns.name: pricing_dt
columns.explanation: Syndication pricing date. Stored with 00:00:00 hours.

columns.name: public_offer_start_dt
columns.explanation: Public offer opening date for Syndications. Stored with 00:00:00 hours.

columns.name: public_offer_end_dt
columns.explanation: Public offer closing date for Syndications. Stored with 00:00:00 hours.

columns.name: app_closing_dt
columns.explanation: Application closing date for bids. Stored with 00:00:00 hours.

columns.name: total_amount_offered
columns.explanation: Total nominal amount offered to the market for the issuance.

columns.name: mas_intended_tender_amount
columns.explanation: Intended tender amount reserved by MAS.

columns.name: coupon_rate
columns.explanation: Coupon rate of the security, stored as a string to accommodate dynamic formatting or predefined rates.

columns.name: accrued_interest_days
columns.explanation: Number of accrued interest days applicable to the offering.

columns.name: announcement_footnotes
columns.explanation: Footnotes applicable to this announcement.

columns.name: remarks
columns.explanation: Internal remarks or comments for workflow tracking.

columns.name: status
columns.explanation: Workflow status of the announcement. Stored as a master code under 'ISSANNSTAT' category; code definitions can be found under the cm.cm_master_code table.

columns.name: user_action
columns.explanation: Workflow action taken by the user. Stored as a master code under 'USERACT' category; code definitions can be found under the cm.cm_master_code table.

columns.name: is_published_immediately
columns.explanation: Indicator representing the publication option. 'Y' means publish immediately upon approval, 'N' means publish at the specified publication_dt.

columns.name: version
columns.explanation: System-assigned value for record versioning used in optimistic locking. Default is 1.

columns.name: is_deleted
columns.explanation: Record deletion indicator. Default is 'N'.

columns.name: is_migrated
columns.explanation: Data migration indicator. Default is 'N'.

columns.name: created_by
columns.explanation: Identifier of the user who created the record.

columns.name: created_dt
columns.explanation: System timestamp of record creation.

columns.name: updated_by
columns.explanation: Identifier of the user who last modified the record.

columns.name: updated_dt
columns.explanation: System timestamp of last record modification.

columns.name: wf_process_id
columns.explanation: Identifier of the workflow process managing approvals.

columns.explanation: Foreign key referencing iss.iss_issuance. Links the bid to its security issuance.

columns.explanation: Foreign key referencing iss.iss_run. Links the bid to the specific allotment run that processed it.

columns.explanation:
Unique identifier grouping a specific bid submission event for the Maker-Checker workflow.   

Whether a Maker submits a single bid/multiple bids via manual entry, or a large batch via file upload, all bids submitted within that single user submission share the same UUID.

columns.name: bank_ref_no
columns.explanation:
The participating bank's unique internal reference number for this specific transaction. 

Flows either from the 'Bank ref. no.' text field during manual bid creation via OMEGA, or it is mapped directly from bulk file uploads. 

Unique for each individual bid submitted by a Primary Dealer for the same issuance.

columns.name: applicant_name
columns.explanation: The full name of the institutional applicant.
columns.possibleValues: e.g. 'DBS BANK LTD', 'The Monetary Authority of Singapore'

columns.name: type_of_applicant
columns.explanation: Category of the applicant. Stored as master code under 'APPLNTYPE' category, code definitions can be found under the cm.cm_master_code table.

columns.name: application_type
columns.explanation: Funding source or application category. Stored as master code under 'APPTYPE' category, code definitions can be found under the cm.cm_master_code table.

columns.name: application_source
columns.explanation: Submission source of the bid application. Stored as master code under 'APPSRC' category, code definitions can be found under the cm.cm_master_code table.

columns.name: submission_method
columns.explanation: Submission method indicator. Stored as master code under 'SUBMTHD' category, code definitions can be found under the cm.cm_master_code table.

columns.name: settlement_bank_code
columns.explanation: The 4-digit bank code of the settlement bank handling the transaction.

columns.name: custody_code
columns.explanation: Custody account identifier for MEPS+ delivery and settlement. Stored as master code under 'CUSTCODE' category, code definitions can be found under the cm.cm_master_code table.

columns.name: bid_type
columns.explanation: An internal system flag used to identify bids automatically generated and inserted by the OMEGA Allotment Engine. Stored as a master code under the 'BIDTYPE' category, code definitions can be found under the cm.cm_master_code table. For standard user-submitted bids, this is NULL.

columns.name: nominal_amount
columns.explanation: The requested nominal amount (face value) the applicant wishes to purchase.

columns.name: accepted_amount
columns.explanation: The portion of the nominal amount accepted into the auction engine after allotment pre-checks and required limits passed.

columns.name: allotted_amount
columns.explanation: Final nominal amount allotted to the institutional applicant after the allotment run. Computed with Dirty Cut-off Price × Allotted Amount ÷ 100

columns.name: settlement_amount
columns.explanation: The actual financial amount payable/to be settled for the bid.

columns.name: is_competitive
columns.explanation: Flag indicating if the bid is competitive.

columns.name: yield_pct
columns.explanation: The bid yield percentage submitted by the applicant. Only applicable if the bid is competitive.

columns.name: dirty_price
columns.explanation: The dirty price corresponding to the submitted yield.

columns.name: user_action
columns.explanation: Workflow action taken on the bid. Stored as master code under 'USERACT' category, code definition can be found under cm.cm_master_code table.

columns.name: status
columns.explanation: Workflow status of the bid. Stored as master code under 'ISSBIDSTAT' category, code definition can be found under cm.cm_master_code table.

columns.name: remarks
columns.explanation: Internal remarks or comments for workflow tracking.

columns.explanation: Data migration indicator. Default is 'N'.

columns.explanation: System timestamp of record creation.

columns.name: allotted_amount

columns.name: settlement_amount

columns.explanation: Foreign key referencing sec.sec_security_master. Ties the issuance event to its security record.

columns.explanation: Issue number denoting if the issuance is new or a reopen. Defaults to '01' for new; 02 to 99 serve as the number of reopen issuances.

columns.name: security_type
columns.explanation: The type of security being issued.

columns.name: issuance_type
columns.explanation: Method of issuance. Stored as master code under 'ISSTYPE' category, code definition can be found under cm.cm_master_code table.

columns.name: new_reopen_flag
columns.explanation: Indicates if the issue is a New offering or a Reopen of an existing security.

columns.name: is_benchmark
columns.explanation: Benchmark bond indicator.

columns.name: issue_dt
columns.explanation: Date of security issuance and settlement. Stored with 00:00:00 hours.

columns.name: auction_dt
columns.explanation: Date of the auction event. Stored with 00:00:00 hours.

columns.name: maturity_dt
columns.explanation: Date when the security reaches full maturity. Stored with 00:00:00 hours.

columns.name: announcement_dt
columns.explanation: Date and time when the issuance is publicly announced.

columns.name: app_closing_dt
columns.explanation: Date and time when the bid application and submission window closes for market participants. This is standardized and applicable to all Non-SSB, SSBs, and Syndications.

columns.name: last_coupon_payment_dt
columns.explanation:
Date of the last coupon payment. For new issuances, this reflects the issue date. 

This is mapped from LAST_INT_DATE via secmast.txt upon creation. Subsequently updated daily by secint.txt only for the issuance record where issue_no = '01'.

columns.name: next_coupon_payment_dt
columns.explanation:
Date of the next scheduled coupon payment. For new issuances, this reflects the first coupon payment date.

masterCodeCategories.definition: Tracks the BPMN workflow status of calendar listings.
Tracks the BPMN workflow status and MEPS+ cross-validation state of security announcements.
Defines the active state of the bid submission window for an issuance.
Tracks the BPMN workflow execution, verification, and publication status of the allotment engine.
Defines the active or inactive lifecycle state for common system parameters.
Defines the security type available. (e.g., SGS Bonds, T-Bills, MAS Bills, SSBs).
Defines the schedule period available for issuance calendar generation (H1, H2, Yearly).
Identifies the method used to generate an issuance calendar (Algorithm, Manual, Upload).
Specifies the issuance types available. (Auction, Syndication, Mini Auction).
Specifies the subtype for SGS bonds. (Market Development, Infra, Green).
Defines the primary allotment mechanism (Uniform Price Auction, Quantity Ceiling Format).
Records the specific Maker or Checker action executed in the BPMN workflow for audit trail capture.
Defines the unit of time measurement (Day, Month, Year) used in configurations.
Tracks the MEPS verification status under issuance table. (Received, Verified).
Tracks the processing and BPMN approval lifecycle of individual bids (Accepted, Allotted, Rejected).
Identifies the originating submission channel for retail bids (ATM, iBanking, Mobile, etc).
Categorizes incoming retail interface files based on the funding source (AP1, AP2, AP3).
Tracks the ingestion and processing outcome of interface batch files.
Identifies the system entry point (Manual, File Upload, Interface).
Classifies the entity type of the bidder (PD, Full Bank, Individual, MAS).
Identifies the funding scheme (Cash, CPFIS-OA, CPFIS-SA, SRS).
Classifies the residency status of retail applicants for aggregate limit checks.
Country Codes: Two-character ISO 3166 country codes used in entity mappings.
Differentiates the funding source for active SSB holdings (Cash vs. SRS).
Standardized error codes for business rule or interface validation failures.
Identifies system-generated institutional bids (MAS Safeguards or Underbidding).
Classifies the custody account category for institutional bids (Trade, Customer, Reserve).
Differentiates if the settlement entity is a Custodian or a Bank.
Tracks the configuration and BPMN workflow approval for safeguard bounds.
Indicates the pass (P) or fail (F) outcome for individual detail records.
Defines the scheduled payout interval for bond coupons (Semi-Annual, Annual).
